_comment: Per-account preference profile. Drop a copy of this file as accounts/<handle>.json for each posting account, edit the values to match the account's voice, then run the pipeline with --account <handle> to bias auto-pick toward this account's preferences. Accounts that look distinct from each other → less coordinated-inauthentic-behavior risk.
_voice_options: soft (cinematic, premium) | playful (casual, slangy) | direct (raunchy, blunt) | mixed
_preferred_fonts_options: Subset of [Instagram Sans Condensed, Instagram Sans Condensed Bold, Sofia Sans Condensed Medium]. Empty list = no preference.
_preferred_styles_options: Subset of [classic, soft, bubble]. Empty list = no preference.
_emoji_frequency_options: off (strip emoji) | low (keep what's written) | medium (random emoji insert) | high (emoji on every hook)
_preferred_hook_patterns_options: Filter spun hooks to these opener patterns. Empty list = no filter. Patterns: pov, pov_colon, when_you, me_when, the_way, tell_me_why, imagine, no_because, the_fact_that, nothing_like, that_thing_where, direct, question, ngl_suffix, fr_suffix
_force_lowercase: If true, lowercase all captions for this account regardless of slang spinner output.
_color_scheme_options: auto | light | dark — overrides per-clip auto-pick if set
